case_title: MANUEL F JIMENEZ VS. GLORIA O GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-04-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY JIMENEZ, MANUEL F GONZALEZ, GLORIA O
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ, MANUEL F AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, GLORIA O
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY JIMENEZ, MANUEL F AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, GLORIA O ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ, MANUEL F RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, GLORIA O $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,150.00, THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WHOLLY AT FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT. THE DAMAGES REASONABLY ATTRIBUTABLE TO THE ACCIDENT EXCEED FAIR MARKET VALUE OF THE VEHICLE WHICH THE COURT FINDS TO HAVE BEEN $2,100.00 AT THE TIME OF THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
